hero.description: Find the best flight and hotel deals in seconds. English interface and real-time currency switching.

chips.noFees: No hidden markups or surprise fees

fast.title: Search in 5 seconds
fast.text: We scan 100+ sources at once and show the best options instantly.

payments.title: Flexible payments
payments.text: Pay in your preferred currency and compare options side by side.

global.title: Worldwide coverage
global.text: From city breaks in Europe to long-haul trips across the globe.

support.title: 24/7 support
support.text: Our partners help with refunds, changes, and booking questions anytime.

destinations.title: Where to fly now
destinations.description: Popular routes with pre-filled search forms and up-to-date fares.

hotels.title: Places to stay for every style and budget
hotels.description: We compare rates from Booking, Agoda, Ostrovok and more so you can book with confidence.

discounts.title: Up to 60% off
discounts.text: Save by comparing multiple booking platforms

cancel.title: Free cancellation
cancel.text: Choose flexible options with no upfront stress

esim.title: Travel internet in minutes
esim.description: Buy your eSIM online and activate it before departure. Works in 200+ countries and usually costs less than roaming.

highlights.delivery: Instant QR delivery to your email
highlights.devices: Compatible with iPhone, Samsung, Google Pixel, Huawei

flight.errorCity: Please select departure and destination cities

hotel.errorCity: Please select a city for hotel search

footer.description: Find cheap flights and hotels worldwide. We compare dozens of airlines and booking systems in seconds.
footer.partners: Search and booking are provided by Aviasales & Hotellook partners.

banner.title: We use cookies to improve your experience
banner.description: We use strictly necessary cookies to operate this website and, with your consent, analytics and marketing cookies to measure traffic and personalize offers. You can accept all cookies, reject optional cookies, or configure your preferences by category.

modal.title: Cookie settings
modal.description: Manage cookie categories. You can change your choice at any time using the footer link.

necessary.title: Necessary
necessary.description: These cookies are required for core website functionality, including navigation, security, basic preferences, and proper content rendering. They cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Analytics cookies help us understand how visitors use the website, which pages are most useful, and how we can improve the service. Data is processed in aggregated form.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.description: Marketing cookies are used to measure campaign performance, reduce repeated ads, and show more relevant offers on third-party platforms.
